title: Stack Furnace
body:
Hello player, I'm glad you're interested in my mod. This is a creation I made because I really wanted an overpowered furnace mod, so here it is!

This mod, as incredible as it may not seem, goes beyond just a furnace. I have a path I want to follow but without spoilers.

**In case of bugs or suggestions, please feel free to let me know.**

# Features
- Furnace
- Stacked Amethyst Tank
- Stackstone
- Stackstone Tools
- Stack Transporter


# Explanations

### Furnace
It has 3 stages of upgrades, which are: Time, Multiplier, Fuel.Out of the 3, only the multiplier increases.

For maximum time reduction, you need 65 furnaces.
For maximum multiplier increase, you need 6,464 furnaces.
For maximum fuel usage reduction, you need 12,800,000 furnaces.

The furnace comes with a visualization of its information, so don't worry about that.

To stack the furnaces, simply click to place one next to another (Yes, it will disappear!), a message will appear in your toolbar, indicating that the upgrade has been made. Also, if you have more than one furnace in your hand and hold shift to place them, it will insert all at once.

**Auto Input Fuel (AIF)** It's a mode that uses any item that can be used as fuel, as fuel. This can be useful if you only want to put any item into a hopper in the furnace.

If you don't want to use the AIF, I recommend using lava.


### Stacked Amethyst Tank
This is still a very new feature; I still have future plans for it.

It's a lava tank, made with stacked amethyst. When activated with redstone, it allows you to send lava to the block in front of it, if the block accepts it.


### Stackstone
I still have a future use for it; just one use in this case.

A ugly stone, made from pieces of Stack Furnace. You can use this stone to make tools and the stack transporter.


### Stackstone Tools
Standard Minecraft tools (Pickaxe, Axe, etc.), even though they are made of stone (Stackstone), still have the properties of iron tools.


### Stack Transporter
An item that allows you to carry your furnace (And Stackstone block) wherever you want, including a way to place two furnaces side by side without stacking them.
